series_metadata.series_description: Documentation pertaining to complaints received by and investigations conducted by the Medical Transportation Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital files permanently in onsite and offsite locations ; Paper: If Board takes no action, destroy after decision has been published in approved board minutes. If board takes action, retain for 1 year after investigation is complete, no further action is pending, and decision has been approved in board minutes. Convert to digital files the destroy hard copy., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
